galleryItems.title: Facial Rebalancing and Under-Eye Restoration
galleryItems.description:
This patient presented with mild volume loss in the mid-face, under-eye hollowing, and early signs of facial descent.

We performed a 5-point lifting protocol to restore structural support, improve facial proportions, and rejuvenate the periorbital area.

The after image demonstrates:
	•	Improved mid-face support
	•	Reduced under-eye hollowing
	•	Restored facial contour
	•	A fresher, more youthful appearance

The result maintains natural expression while enhancing overall facial harmony.

galleryItems.title: Dynamic Line Softening
galleryItems.description:
his patient presented with pronounced dynamic lines across the forehead caused by repetitive muscle movement.

A targeted upper-face anti-wrinkle treatment was performed to reduce muscular overactivity while maintaining natural facial expression.

The result demonstrates:

Softened forehead lines
Reduced dynamic movement
A smoother and more refreshed upper face
Preserved natural expression


The aim was not to eliminate movement completely, but to achieve a balanced, relaxed and naturally rejuvenated appearance.

galleryItems.title: Natural Lip Enhancement
galleryItems.description:
This patient desired a fresh and healthy lip enhancement while maintaining a natural appearance.

A precise lip augmentation treatment was performed to:

Restore central volume
Improve lip definition
Enhance hydration
Maintain natural proportions


The result demonstrates improved fullness in the central lip body, enhanced symmetry, and a soft, hydrated finish without overcorrection.

The lips remain balanced, elegant, and in harmony with the patient’s facial features.
